[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BXP_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BXP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0065.7502] The Supplemental cash flow section has reported a value of 273,214,000 for the element us-gaap:InterestPaid but the element InterestPaidNet is not included in the supplemental cash flow section. Interest Paid Net of the capitalized component must be reported in this section. The element us-gaap:InterestPaid includes capitalized interest. If this element has no capitalized interest component then use the element InterestPaidNet instead.
